summary: Automated security dependency update PR that changed Cargo.lock to move mio from 0.8.10 to 0.8.11, update the crate checksum, and update the Cargo.lock format version from 3 to 4. The PR body claims this addresses CVE-2024-27308 based on trivy output, but the loaded diff only shows Cargo.lock changes and no review discussion.

key_files.role: Only changed file in loaded metadata and diff; updates Cargo lockfile version and the mio package entry.

what_changed.text: Cargo.lock lockfile format version changed from 3 to 4.
The locked mio crate version changed from 0.8.10 to 0.8.11.
The mio crate checksum was updated to match the new locked version.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: checksum changed from 8f3d0b... to a4a650...

what_changed.text: The PR body states the update was intended to address CVE-2024-27308 and was flagged by trivy.

smart_moves.text: The dependency change was narrow in the loaded diff: only the lockfile entry and lockfile format version changed.

notes: Loaded changed-file metadata and raw diff show only Cargo.lock changed, while the PR body lists both Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock.
No review comments, issue comments, or reviews are present in the loaded slice.
Verification items such as build passes, scanner re-scan, and LLM code review passed are PR-body claims only; no independent build or scanner logs are loaded.

The PR body description says CVE-2024-27308 affects rpm-ostree versions less than 2024.4-1, while the actual diff updates mio; this mismatch should not be promoted as a verified vulnerability fact beyond what the PR body claims.
This PR contains no decompilation source, matching, assembly, naming, or review evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not extract decompilation lessons from this PR; the loaded evidence is a Rust dependency lockfile update only.
Do not promote the CVE-to-mio relationship as a verified security fact from this intake alone because the PR body contains a package-description mismatch and no scanner log is loaded.
Do not record Cargo.toml as a changed file from this slice; the body mentions it, but changed-file metadata and diff only show Cargo.lock.
